text: The small voice model should read this sentence clearly without rushing.
A quiet assistant needs stable timing, clean vowels, and no metallic ringing.
Please compare the teacher output with the student output on unfamiliar text.
Numbers like 42, 105, and 2026 must be handled by the frontend before synthesis.
The decoder is allowed to be tiny, but it must not sound like a broken radio.
If the oracle latent sounds bad, blame the decoder before blaming the acoustic model.
This longer sentence checks whether breath groups and pauses remain natural after distillation.
Edge devices need fast speech synthesis that still feels pleasant for repeated listening.
The package should expose phoneme IDs first, then add a standalone text frontend later.
A useful benchmark needs short, medium, and longer sentences in the held out set.
Do not hide the teacher dependency inside a self contained model claim.
The final English student should stay under the same parameter budget as Nepali.
